evals.prompt: Update work item 0001 to status ready
evals.expected_output: Should show a diff preview (-status: done / +status: ready), ask for confirmation, and on 'y' write the change. Should also update the body **Status**: label if present.

assertions.name: shows_diff_preview
assertions.description: Shows a before/after diff with the old and new status values
assertions.check: Output contains both '-status: done' and '+status: ready' (or equivalent diff notation)

assertions.name: asks_confirmation
assertions.description: Asks user to confirm before writing
assertions.check: Output contains a y/n confirmation prompt before any file write

assertions.name: no_file_write_before_confirm
assertions.description: Does not use Edit tool before user confirms
assertions.check: No Edit tool calls appear before the confirmation prompt

evals.expected_output: Should print an error that work_item_id cannot be changed and suggest file rename via jj mv. Should NOT show a diff or write anything.

assertions.name: hard_blocks_work_item_id
assertions.description: Prints error about work_item_id being immutable
assertions.check: Output contains 'work_item_id cannot be changed' or equivalent error message

assertions.name: mentions_rename
assertions.description: Suggests file rename as the correct approach
assertions.check: Output mentions 'jj mv' or file rename

assertions.name: no_diff_shown
assertions.description: Does not show a diff preview or write any files
assertions.check: No diff preview and no Edit tool calls

evals.prompt: Update work item 0011 to priority high
evals.expected_output: Should handle a legacy work item (type: adr-creation-task, no priority field) gracefully. Should show a diff with +priority: high (field insertion). May note that the work item has a non-template type but should proceed.

assertions.name: handles_legacy_work_item
assertions.description: Does not error on non-template type value adr-creation-task
assertions.check: Does not refuse to update or require migration of the legacy work item

assertions.name: shows_field_insertion
assertions.description: Shows priority being added as a new field
assertions.check: Output shows +priority: high in the diff (field insertion, not replacement)

assertions.name: asks_confirmation
assertions.description: Asks user to confirm before writing
assertions.check: Output contains a y/n confirmation prompt
